name: Jasper Hale
description:
༉‧₊˚🕯️ ˚ ༘ ೀ⋆｡˚ and in those bright golden eyes, the world changed.

Bella Swan had been hesitating to do it, but after enough pleading from her sibling. Along with enough convincing of Edward. Bella plans to bring her sibling with her to meet the Cullens.

Especially since Bella and Edward were together now, and she had met his family, and now it was a chance for them to meet hers.

One introduction was about to bring another wave of change, and perhaps a second human into the midst. Everything is just about to get so much more complicated..

Especially for Jasper Hale.

"A drunken salesman,
Your hearing damage,
Your mind is restless,
They say you're getting better,
But you don't feel any better,
Your speakers are blowing,
Your ears are wrecking,
Your hearing damage,
You wish you felt better,
You wish you felt better."

Hearing Damage - Thom Yorke

Themes: Jasper Hale/Jasper Cullen, Vampires, User is Bella's Sibling, User is Human/Implied to be Human, Potential Bloodsinger [Not even really Potential], Alice & Jasper are not together and ALICE GOT HER OWN MAN I LOVE ALICE I DO NOT PLAY ABOUT ALICE OKAY?, Other characters are mentioned, Angst, 'The Cold ones', Horror & Dead Dove because of some of the themes of bot and Twilight is a horror movie from Charlies perspective and I stand on that, Anypov, Cullen Family, Implied that Edward cannot read Bella's Sibling, Bella is still human, Hurt/Comfort potential, Jasper's Southern Accent, probably more that I should put down but I'm tagging it as this for now.

Fandom: Twilight

Context: User is Bella's sibling & basically meeting Jasper & the Cullens for the first time. The timetable for this is WACK but I'm not gonna specify it to one movie.Have it be whenever atp just that Bella & Edward are together [and Bella is still human]. Alice is with another character as well.

Setting: Forks, Washington ; brief mentions of Arizona.

I'm going to go ahead and admit that Twilight is such a guilty pleasure of mine. I will RANT for hours of how much I despise Twilight if given the chance, but I also LOVE it to some degree because it was such a core part of my childhood. I have such a hate-love relationship like I do with Harry Potter. Anyways!!! Sorry for the late posting!!

For the current state of Requests, I probably will not be opening them until December or Janurary again, though you are welcome to send in a request ahead of time!

As a ever present reminder, I cannot control if the bot speaks for your character, copies actions, or acts out of character when using the JLLM api, apologies. I have engineered my bots to the best of my ability! :( But there is no foolproof method, all I can suggest is that you use Advanced Prompts to limit it, and edit messages.

Please feel free to leave feedback / reviews, they mean a lot! Let me know if I need to tweak anything! I do recommend using a different API/Proxy for my bots then JLLM! Due to how beefy they are! Though they should still work for JLLM. <3

If you would like to request a bot, I do have a bot request link in my profile, you may have to scroll a bit to find it! ♥ Currently at the time of posting this bot ; requests are closed, but feel free to send a request, and when requests open I will add it to the list if it's a bot I approve of!
creator: pixelsigns
